opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had a low-grade fever and drenching night sweats for about two weeks now, I feel completely wiped out, and now these really sore red bumps have come up on the tips of my fingers. Something isn't right.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The fever just won't shift, I've lost weight without trying, and yesterday these painful spots appeared on my fingers out of nowhere — I'm worried enough to call after hours.

symptom_narrative.onset: the fever, chills and night sweats started about 14 days ago; the painful finger bumps appeared suddenly yesterday
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly two weeks and not improving
symptom_narrative.character: a persistent low-grade fever with shivering and heavy night sweats that soak the sheets, plus deep body aches and no energy at all; the finger bumps are exquisitely tender and red
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel really unwell and drained — worse than any flu I've had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the fevers and aches are all over; the sore bumps are on the pads of my index and middle fingers
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the fever and sweats have been constant for two weeks; the finger bumps came on within the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — paracetamol barely touches it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: chills, drenching night sweats, deep muscle aches, and I've lost about 3 kilos without trying
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm mostly stuck in bed, too exhausted and achy to cook or look after myself properly

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I was told years ago I was born with a heart valve that's a bit different — a bicuspid aortic valve

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: regular over-the-counter doses for the fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; over the past couple of weeks has been too weak and exhausted to prepare proper meals or manage day to day

objective_data_offered.value: 38.4 degrees on my home thermometer this evening
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-measured home thermometer, not calibrated or clinician-verified

objective_data_offered.value: several tender, raised red nodules on the pads of the index and middle fingers, shown up close to the camera
thin dark reddish-brown lines visible under several fingernails when held to the camera
appears flushed, sweaty and shivery on camera, looks unwell and worn out
about 3 kg of unintentional weight loss over the past two weeks
several sweat-soaked towels piled on the bed from the night sweats
